sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports feeling lightheaded and experiencing occasional nausea, particularly when sitting in a car. He reports a slight decrease in appetite. He denies bleeding from any sites and denies fever or chills. The patient reports pain in his hand.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals tenderness to the right lower quadrant upon palpation. The patient's heart rhythm is regular. Lung sounds are clear. Neurological exam is unremarkable. Hemoglobin is 8.2.
medical_concepts: tenderness to the right lower quadrant

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and lab findings are consistent with anemia. A possible gastritis is identified via endoscopy.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a complete blood count. Order protonix 40 milligrams once daily. Advise the patient to reduce caffeine intake and avoid ibuprofen. Schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks. Arrange for the nurse to finalize the note.

medical_concepts: tenderness to the right lower quadrant
